goal: seq_frequently_in_real_set(s, a) = forall(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and s.contains(a(k0)) } }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Nat -> Real) { forall(x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x2 <= k0 and x1(k0) ∈ x0 } } = seq_frequently_in_real_set(x0, x1) }(s, a)
